invariants.predicate: A deferred background audio chunk exists without wake buffering support.
invariants.regressionException: Active diagnostic guard; focused regression not added yet.

invariants.predicate: The backend attempted an active PTT wake path without a token-backed row for the selected target device.
invariants.regressionException: Backend source lives in bb/main; register before adding checker-backed Unison regression metadata.
invariants.repairAction: Do not silently retarget an active transmit to another latest token row; require the exact selected target device to remain token-backed.

invariants.predicate: Active transmit matched the signaling sender while backend joined-presence truth was missing.
invariants.regressionException: Backend detector exists in bb/main; focused Unison regression metadata not added yet.

invariants.predicate: Backend active transmit exists while the selected Conversation is neither joined nor wake-addressable.
invariants.repairAction: Membership loss, token loss, and local join failure must clear active transmit when they remove the only addressable receiver.

invariants.predicate: The backend channel-state projection reached connecting without durable membership or request evidence.
invariants.regressionException: Backend detector exists in bb/main; focused Unison regression metadata not added yet.

invariants.predicate: The join route attempted to mark an active channel without connected websocket session evidence.
invariants.regressionException: Backend detector exists in bb/main; focused Unison regression metadata not added yet.

invariants.predicate: Channel membership regressed from a live projection to idle or absent without an authoritative leave, disconnect, expiry, or repair reason.
invariants.regressionException: Backend source of truth lives in bb/main; register the invariant now and add the emitting checker-backed regression there.

invariants.predicate: A Direct QUIC attempt remains active after the surfaced media path has fallen back to relay or Fast Relay and no Direct QUIC probe controller is alive.
invariants.repairAction: Clear the stale Direct QUIC attempt without retry backoff so the normal selected-contact or automatic reprobe can start.

invariants.predicate: A correctly addressed initial Direct QUIC offer from the selected Conversation is dropped only because backend peer fingerprint projection has not caught up yet.
invariants.repairAction: Accept the initial offer provisionally when envelope, peer device, local target, selected contact, and signal fingerprint evidence match; record recent peer-device evidence so later backend projection can converge.

invariants.predicate: A Direct QUIC attempt is active with a live probe controller while the surfaced media transport path is relay, Fast Relay, promoting, or recovering.
invariants.repairAction: Restore the surfaced transport path to Direct and suppress redundant prewarm/probe attempts while the active Direct path owns the media route.

invariants.predicate: A selected or active Direct QUIC media path was lost while Fast Relay was enabled/configured, but no Fast Relay fallback connection was active or started.
invariants.repairAction: Start or reuse the Fast Relay packet-media standby when Direct QUIC path loss is handled, then let Direct QUIC reprobe independently.

invariants.predicate: A Direct QUIC packet media path is marked lost only because the ordered control stream completed while the datagram media path remains the active lane.
invariants.repairAction: Treat control-stream completion as a completed control receive, not packet-media path loss; continue processing packet media and control messages delivered on the message path.

invariants.predicate: A Direct QUIC packet media path is marked lost only because the auxiliary ordered-control receive path failed while packet media remains the active lane.
invariants.repairAction: Treat the ordered-control receive error as control-plane degradation, keep packet media active, and let datagram receive or consent failure make the path-loss decision.

invariants.predicate: A Fast Relay promotion attempt waits indefinitely or long enough to leave the selected call on WebSocket relay instead of selecting or failing into another lane.
invariants.repairAction: Bound QUIC/TCP relay handshake time and fall through to the next relay transport or explicit failure quickly.

invariants.predicate: A selected foreground Direct QUIC listener received an explicit selected-prewarm request from the peer while a connectivity retry backoff would otherwise keep the pair on relay or Fast Relay.
invariants.repairAction: Record the liveness violation, clear connectivity retry backoff, and accept the selected Direct QUIC prewarm request so the listener can offer again.

invariants.predicate: A Direct QUIC remote-offer upgrade request was sent more than once for the same contact, channel, and peer device inside the request throttle window without a fresh-session guard reset.
invariants.repairAction: Reserve the Direct QUIC upgrade-request throttle before the async websocket send leaves the app actor, then clear the reservation only if the send fails before delivery.

invariants.predicate: A media relay receiver-prewarm request or ACK control frame was sent more than once for the same contact, channel, peer device, request id, and control kind without a relay or fresh-session recovery boundary.
invariants.repairAction: Reserve media relay receiver-prewarm request and ACK sends before the async relay send leaves the app actor, coalesce duplicate paths, and clear the reservation only if the send fails.

invariants.predicate: An outgoing transmit/audio target does not match the contact directory, backend channel, remote user, or local device identity.
invariants.repairAction: Fail closed before installing an outgoing audio route for a target whose channel/user/device identity is not the current contact identity.

invariants.predicate: An outgoing audio send side effect attempted to run after its transmit target stopped being current.
invariants.repairAction: Drop stale audio payloads before backend, relay, Direct QUIC, or media-relay side effects when neither app transmit ownership nor engine transmit epoch matches the target.

invariants.predicate: A first-audio playback ACK existed but did not match the pending channel, sender device, receiver device, transport, or packet epoch expectation.
invariants.repairAction: Ignore mismatched ACKs and keep the pending expectation armed for the current transmit epoch.

invariants.predicate: A media relay control frame was decoded for a channel or peer device that does not match the current relay peer binding.
invariants.repairAction: Ignore stale relay control frames before mutating prewarm or ACK state.

invariants.predicate: The backend channel-state projection reported no membership while durable channel membership still existed.
invariants.regressionException: Backend detector exists in bb/main; focused Unison regression metadata not added yet.

invariants.predicate: The backend may project joined, ready, signaling-authorized, or transmit-capable state only when the device has an active Conversation participant lease for that channel: durable membership, matching fresh channel presence, and connected current Device session evidence.
invariants.repairAction: Suppress active Conversation projection when the participant lease cannot be derived; stale durable rows may remain but no longer imply active Conversation state.

invariants.predicate: A fresh websocket session cleared stale channel membership left behind by an old Device PTT session.
invariants.repairAction: turbo.service.presence.internal.clearStaleChannelMembershipOnSessionConnect ends transmit and removes stale direct-channel memberships during fresh session connect.

invariants.predicate: Raw peer presence matched the channel without fresh connected session evidence.
invariants.repairAction: turbo.service.channels.internal.appendStalePeerPresenceProjectedLiveInvariant marks stale Friend presence offline before emitting if the projection remains stale.

invariants.predicate: Raw self presence matched the channel without fresh connected session evidence.
invariants.repairAction: turbo.service.channels.internal.appendStaleSelfPresenceProjectedLiveInvariant marks stale self presence offline before emitting if the projection remains stale.

invariants.predicate: Contact summary projected connectable without live peer visibility or request evidence.
invariants.repairAction: Contact summaries derive channel membership from active participant leases and current request facts instead of durable membership rows alone.

invariants.predicate: Presence was marked offline/background while socket truth still remained for the device. Session-only continuity after the socket is cleared is allowed for background/offline grace.
invariants.regressionException: Backend detector exists in bb/main; focused Unison regression metadata not added yet.

invariants.predicate: A fresh websocket session found and cleared stale active-channel presence from a previous session.
invariants.repairAction: turbo.service.presence.internal.clearStaleActiveChannelOnSessionConnect clears only the stale active-channel pointer; durable membership is preserved so reconnect recovery can rejoin idempotently.

invariants.predicate: The visible call screen exposes Hold To Talk while the selected Conversation phase is not live.
invariants.repairAction: Derive call-screen visibility and primary action from selected friend state; stale expansion requests must not force a live call surface.

invariants.predicate: The visible call screen is rendered for a selected Conversation whose authoritative client projection is idle.
invariants.repairAction: Call-screen presentation must be derived by ConversationStateMachine.shouldShowCallScreen and must collapse when the selected Conversation returns to idle.

invariants.predicate: The visible call screen is rendered for an incoming Beep before accept created local join evidence.
invariants.repairAction: Incoming Beep expansion may surface the Beep affordance, but call-screen presentation requires pending join, local Device PTT, system PushToTalk, or backend Conversation evidence.

invariants.predicate: The visible call screen is rendered for a selected Conversation whose authoritative client projection is still outgoing Beep.
invariants.repairAction: Outgoing Beep state may show Beep affordances, but call-screen presentation must stay collapsed until join evidence or a live call phase exists.

invariants.predicate: Encrypted media replay protection rejected an already-seen packet.
invariants.regressionException: Security diagnostic guard; focused replay regression not added yet.

invariants.predicate: Duplicate transmit prepare/start control for an already-active remote receive must not reset the audio receive epoch, packet dedupe window, or first-playback ACK sent state.
invariants.repairAction: Receive execution treats transmit control as an idempotent audio epoch boundary: only a new transmit epoch resets media receive diagnostics, E2EE receive sequence, and first-playback ACK sent state.

invariants.predicate: Outbound audio transport dropped an audio payload because the sender queue reached its backpressure limit.
invariants.repairAction: Direct low-latency sending uses a larger bounded queue and focused sender-policy tests prevent regressions to an unrealistically small backpressure window.

invariants.predicate: Outbound audio transport send took long enough to create live-audio backlog risk.
invariants.regressionException: Runtime liveness detector for physical-device transport stalls; deterministic engine replay covers resulting packet gaps.
invariants.repairAction: Keep live audio send handlers off avoidable main-actor bookkeeping, preserve backend/Apple authority before transport fanout, and keep Direct QUIC standby fallback fanout nonblocking after direct delivery.

invariants.predicate: Packet-style live audio transport dropped queued payloads after a slow send or stop-drain timeout so stale speech cannot drain after a transport stall.
invariants.repairAction: Packet lanes may clear queued live audio after slow transport completion; ordered continuity lanes preserve queued payloads across slow sends and use a more patient bounded stop drain.

invariants.predicate: An active receive epoch accepted audio chunks with an excessive inter-arrival gap.
invariants.repairAction: Record the gap at receive ingress before playback symptoms so physical-device diagnostics can separate network delivery gaps from playback scheduling gaps.

invariants.predicate: An active receive epoch accepted audio sequence numbers with one or more missing frames.
invariants.repairAction: Record missing frame counts before audible symptoms so physical-device diagnostics can classify dropped/lost audio without manual counting.

invariants.predicate: Incoming live-audio payload sat in a local transport receive queue beyond the freshness budget.
invariants.repairAction: Preserve short packet queue stalls for playout, but drop expired live backlog once the freshness budget is exceeded so delayed speech is not replayed after the fact.

invariants.predicate: Adaptive audio playout had to synthesize repeated missing voice frames with PLC or increase its cushion after underrun.
invariants.repairAction: Use the adaptive playout buffer to increase cushion for the active receive path and preserve per-frame packet metadata for transport diagnosis.

invariants.predicate: Incoming voice frame inter-arrival jitter exceeded the active playback profile budget.
invariants.repairAction: Keep playout buffered by transport profile and use the jitter evidence to separate network delay from playback scheduling problems.

invariants.predicate: A peer sent an Opus v2 media frame to a receiver that could not decode Opus or had not proven support for that codec.
invariants.repairAction: Fail closed to PCM unless fresh peer capability evidence proves Opus v2 support, and record mismatches at decode time.

invariants.predicate: Both devices report backend readiness, but at least one selected UI projection is not live.
invariants.regressionException: Merged pair detector is active; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: One device is connectable while the Friend remains idle/outgoingBeep without an equivalent connectable projection.
invariants.regressionException: Merged pair detector is active; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: One device is ready while the peer has not converged to a compatible live Conversation projection.
invariants.regressionException: Merged pair detector is active; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: One device observes a pending outgoing Beep while the receiver's latest diagnostics does not observe the matching incoming Beep after the receiver evidence should be fresh.
invariants.regressionException: Merged pair detector is active; follow-up scenario/projection proof should be added once the receiver freshness owner is fixed.

invariants.predicate: A receiver declared remote audio drained before the peer's Direct transmit had ended.
Both devices project friend-ready state without local Device PTT evidence.
invariants.regressionException: Merged pair detector is active; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: The system began foreground transmit without a local foreground press owner.
invariants.repairAction: rejectForegroundSystemTransmitBeginWithoutLocalIntentIfNeeded stops system transmit, clears pending begin state, and syncs transmit/UI state.

invariants.predicate: Apple restored a PTT channel that the app cannot map to backend contact truth.
invariants.repairAction: clearUnresolvedRestoredSystemSessionIfNeeded clears the unresolved restored PTT system session after backend refresh cannot map it.

invariants.predicate: Apple delivered a local system-begin while the app projects the peer as active transmitter.
invariants.repairAction: rejectSystemTransmitBeginIfPeerIsActive stops local system transmit and preserves peer-transmit authority.

invariants.predicate: Receiver background readiness is not ready and no typed wake reason explains it.
Receiver audio readiness publishes the same semantic state more than once for the same contact/channel/device control-plane epoch without a reconnect recovery boundary.
invariants.repairAction: Equivalent readiness publications are suppressed by the control-plane reducer; reconnect and backend signaling recovery republishes are explicit recovery boundaries.

invariants.predicate: Receiver-ready is never published from transitional media evidence such as idle, preparing, failed, or closed; superseded media-state sync requests are no-ops.
invariants.repairAction: The app drops superseded media-state sync requests, suppresses receiver-ready publication from current transitional media evidence, and strict diagnostics flags any published receiver-ready with such a reason.

invariants.predicate: Receiver-ready is never published while an explicit leave or reconciled teardown is in flight for the contact.
invariants.repairAction: Pending leave now blocks local receiver-ready desire, peer routability for readiness publication, and direct ready publish effects.

invariants.predicate: A pending Beep to an available recipient must not send an alert APNs surface in addition to the foreground/control-plane request projection.
invariants.repairAction: createControlCommand suppresses beep alert pushes for available recipients and reserves APNs alert delivery for offline or busy recipients.

invariants.predicate: A direct channel may have only one current Beep Thread; by-id, incoming, and outgoing beep projections must be derived from that canonical channel-keyed row.
invariants.repairAction: beep storage uses a channel-keyed Beep Thread table and atomically rewrites by-id, by-from, and by-to projections when the latest Beep changes direction or status.

invariants.predicate: A stale Beep ID must never resurrect an old Beep; if it is still meaningful, it resolves through the stale-ID alias table to the current canonical Beep Thread for that channel.
invariants.repairAction: Beep Thread replacement records stale Beep IDs as aliases to the channel-keyed current thread so stale accepts converge to the latest pending Beep or fail closed when no current thread exists.

invariants.predicate: Creating a Beep while the reciprocal Beep is still pending must refresh the same pending Beep Thread to the latest sender and must not mark either side connected.
invariants.repairAction: createOrReuseWithOperationId keeps reciprocal creates pending, rewrites the canonical Beep Thread in place, and advances requestCount monotonically.

invariants.predicate: Accepting a Beep may connect the channel only when the Beep sender is currently available; offline or busy senders must fail closed so the recipient can send an ask-back Beep instead.
invariants.repairAction: beep accept checks sender availability before marking pending Beeps connected or joining the channel.

invariants.predicate: Every refresh of an existing pending Beep Thread must monotonically advance the request count, and backend summaries and beep lists must expose that same latest count.
invariants.repairAction: Beep creation and reciprocal ask-back rewrite one canonical Beep Thread and increment requestCount before projections are updated.

invariants.predicate: Multiple local sources that describe the same incoming Beep must converge to one canonical Beep surface key, so opening or accepting one source cannot resurface or double-accept the same Beep through another source.
invariants.repairAction: IncomingBeepSurfaceReducer deduplicates visible, opened, and accepting incoming Beep state by BeepSurfaceKey(contactID, requestCount) instead of per-surface beep IDs.

invariants.predicate: When the app launches or enters foreground, delivered Beep alert surfaces must be cleared so stale Apple notifications cannot be accepted after the app is already showing authoritative Beep state.
invariants.repairAction: TurboAppDelegate clears delivered Beep notifications and resets the badge on launch, will-enter-foreground, and did-become-active.

invariants.predicate: Accepting an in-app foreground Beep must synchronously consume the visible surface and establish at most one local accept/join intent for that Beep.
invariants.repairAction: acceptActiveIncomingBeep marks the surface opened before backend work and fences repeated accepts for the same canonical Beep surface key while the accept intent is in flight.

invariants.predicate: Accepting a visible in-app foreground Beep must use the rendered Beep surface snapshot, so backend sync or duplicate-surface churn during the tap cannot turn the accept into a no-op.
invariants.repairAction: ContentView passes the rendered IncomingBeepSurface into the accept command and PTTViewModel accepts that captured surface directly.

invariants.predicate: Accepting an in-app foreground Beep whose fast notification arrived before Beep projection must preserve a pending accept intent and complete it once the incoming Beep projects.
invariants.repairAction: acceptIncomingBeepSurface stores a pending foreground accept intent, dismisses the visible surface, refreshes Beep state, and reconcile completes the accept when relationship projection becomes incoming.

invariants.predicate: Automatic beep-sync contact selection must not consume or dismiss an active in-app foreground incoming Beep surface; only an explicit user open, dismiss, or accept action may mark that surface opened.
invariants.repairAction: reconcileContactSelectionIfNeeded auto-selects incoming-Beep contacts without calling markIncomingBeepSurfaceOpened, while explicit selectContact user paths still consume the surface.

invariants.predicate: Continuing an Apple INStartCallIntent from a Beep notification must route to the same accept/join command as the in-app and UNNotification accept paths.
invariants.repairAction: ContentView handles INStartCallIntent user activities and PTTViewModel normalizes them into ConversationOpenIntent(action: accept).

invariants.predicate: A foreground Beep notification is present but not represented in the Beep/contact projection.
invariants.repairAction: scheduleBeepProjectionRecovery refreshes contact summaries and beeps after a bounded delay.

invariants.predicate: Synthetic probe event used to verify backend invariant event ingest and readback.

Local Device PTT evidence is active, no connect/join or background wake-timeout flow is in flight, and backend membership still includes the user, but backend readiness reports selfHasActiveDevice=false.
invariants.repairAction: The app reconnects the WebSocket if needed, reasserts backend join, refreshes channel/contact projections, and republishes receiver readiness.

invariants.predicate: Local Device PTT evidence is active, but backend membership dropped self while the peer remained joined.
invariants.repairAction: The app reconnects the WebSocket if needed, reasserts backend join, refreshes channel/contact projections, and republishes receiver readiness.

invariants.predicate: A media relay send was attempted after the relay had already reported the peer unavailable.
invariants.repairAction: The client records the contradiction, clears the stale media relay client, and falls back to WebSocket relay until a fresh relay peer becomes available.

invariants.predicate: Backend dropped durable channel membership while the selected Conversation still had local Device PTT evidence.
invariants.repairAction: effectiveChannelStatePreservingLiveMembership preserves the last known ready channel state until an authoritative leave, disconnect, or explicit inactive-without-membership snapshot arrives.

invariants.predicate: Backend membership is absent while selected Conversation still has a pending local Device PTT action without established Device PTT evidence.
invariants.repairAction: completeAbsentBackendMembershipRecoveryIfDevicePTTEvidenceEnded chooses a typed repair or suppression decision; stale pending join/leave state is cleared only when backend membership is already absent and no valid in-flight join is preserving the local Device PTT action.

invariants.predicate: Backend regressed to idle while the selected Conversation still had active local Device PTT evidence.
invariants.repairAction: effectiveChannelStatePreservingLiveMembership preserves the ready channel state when prior membership evidence exists; if backend latest has already collapsed to idle with no cached membership, the app reasserts the backend join from active local Device PTT evidence and republishes receiver readiness.

invariants.predicate: Backend is idle or absent, no local Device PTT evidence or pending action exists, and sender auto-join is not armed while selected Conversation still projects a connecting pending-join state.
invariants.repairAction: SelectedConversationReducer clears sender auto-join when backend Beep Thread projection and membership are absent, then preserves interruption evidence to block stale sender auto-join rearming.

invariants.predicate: Backend readiness is inactive while selected Conversation remains waiting with joined Device PTT evidence.
invariants.repairAction: ConversationActionCoordinator/SelectedConversationProjection reconciliation tears down invalid local Device PTT state after backend absence is authoritative.

invariants.predicate: Backend membership is absent while selected UI still has joined local Device PTT evidence.
invariants.repairAction: completeAbsentBackendMembershipRecoveryIfDevicePTTEvidenceEnded and reconciled teardown clear local Device PTT state after backend membership becomes absent.

invariants.predicate: Backend join settling is complete and backend says peer is ready/connected while selected Conversation remains blocked on remote audio prewarm.
invariants.repairAction: backend signaling join recovery and selected Conversation refresh wait for remote audio readiness instead of forcing a stale live UI projection.

invariants.predicate: Backend and local Device PTT evidence are ready while selected UI remains waiting because a stale backend-connect pending action survived the successful join.
invariants.repairAction: ConversationActionCoordinatorState.clearAfterSuccessfulJoin clears any matching pending connect action once backend membership and local Device PTT evidence confirm the join.

invariants.predicate: Backend says both sides are ready while selected Conversation is waiting and the app has no concrete local Device PTT evidence, local join attempt, or active local-session restore reconciliation.
invariants.repairAction: Local session restoration must issue an Apple PTT join instead of treating backend/engine membership as local Device PTT evidence.

invariants.predicate: Backend says both sides are ready while selected UI projection remains idle/outgoingBeep/incomingBeep.
invariants.regressionException: Detector exists in app and merged diagnostics; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: Selected Conversation remained in disconnecting state past its bounded timeout.
invariants.repairAction: scheduleDisconnectRecovery retries system leave, resets local PTT/media/transmit runtime, clears pending leave, and refreshes backend membership.

invariants.predicate: The call screen is visible while the authoritative selected Conversation projection is still plain online/requestable.
invariants.repairAction: Call-screen presentation must stay collapsed while selectedConversationPhase remains idle/online; plain requestable state belongs on the detail or home surface until a live/joining phase exists.

invariants.predicate: Selected route toggled from outgoing Beep to call-visible and back to outgoing Beep for the same contact without a selected Conversation phase change.
invariants.repairAction: Call-screen visibility must remain collapsed while selectedConversationPhase stays outgoingBeep; expansion and dismissal transitions must not oscillate without a live-phase transition.

invariants.predicate: A joined Conversation is waiting-for-peer with wake-capable audio readiness but unavailable wake capability.
Selected-session diagnostics report a local join failure.
invariants.regressionException: Merged diagnostics detector is active; promoted scenario expected when this recurs.

invariants.predicate: The selected contact projection says online while selected Conversation status renders offline.
invariants.regressionException: Merged diagnostics detector is active; promoted scenario expected when this recurs.

invariants.predicate: Backend says peer is joined while selected UI remains disconnected/non-connectable.
invariants.regressionException: Detector exists in app and merged diagnostics; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: Backend channel is connectable and receiver wake is available while selected UI remains disconnected/non-connectable.
Selected Conversation regressed to localJoinFailed even though backend still retained self membership and wake-capable receiver recovery evidence.
invariants.repairAction: SelectedConversationReducer suppresses interrupted retry copy while wake-capable backend recovery remains authoritative.

invariants.predicate: Selected Conversation is ready while backend says this device cannot transmit.
Selected Conversation projected wakeReady while backend join settling still had only waiting-for-peer wake-capable evidence.
invariants.repairAction: selected Conversation projection keeps the call in Connecting while backend join is settling; wakeReady is allowed only after the settling window clears or after authoritative connected recovery evidence exists.

invariants.predicate: Selected Conversation phase is ready while the local app is not joined.
Selected Conversation projection remains transmitting after local membership/session exit.
Selected Conversation projection is receiving while the local app lacks joined Conversation or Device PTT activation evidence.
The selected receive path is stuck with stale pending playback drain state.
invariants.repairAction: receive execution schedules or completes remote silence timeout to drain stale pending playback state.

invariants.predicate: Selected Conversation is still disconnecting for reconciled teardown after local Device PTT evidence and backend membership are absent.

A backend channel refresh that still shows local joined membership must not reopen or preserve selected Conversation membership after local Device PTT evidence cleared while an explicit leave is in flight.
invariants.repairAction: Explicit leave acts as a tombstone: stale joined channel refreshes clear local backend/readiness projection and cannot feed joined Conversation evidence into TurboEngine.

invariants.predicate: A peer explicit Direct QUIC disconnect is a conversation-ending fact: the selected device must not continue projecting wakeReady from stale backend wake capability after receiving it.
invariants.repairAction: Treat explicit Direct QUIC path closing as a local leave tombstone, tear down Device PTT, and propagate backend leave instead of downgrading to wake-capable readiness.

invariants.predicate: Backend retained durable channel membership while selected Conversation is friend-ready without local Device PTT evidence.
invariants.repairAction: SelectedConversationEffect.clearStaleBackendMembership sends an idempotent backend leave and clears stale local leave state.

invariants.predicate: Backend retained inactive durable channel membership while the selected app has no local, system, pending, or request evidence for that membership.
invariants.repairAction: ConversationStateMachine projects idle while SelectedConversationEffect.clearStaleBackendMembership sends an idempotent backend leave.

invariants.predicate: Backend readiness is waiting-for-self while selected UI remains disconnected/non-connectable.
Receiver is wake-capable and backend ready while selected Conversation remains blocked on local audio prewarm.
invariants.repairAction: interactive audio prewarm recovery keeps the joined Conversation bounded while waiting for wake-capable receiver audio readiness.

invariants.predicate: The selected Conversation Hold To Talk affordance may be enabled only when the projection has current transmit capability, explicit wake capability, or an active local transmit intent.
invariants.repairAction: SelectedConversationState.allowsHoldToTalk derives from canTransmitNow and permits only wakeReady, startingTransmit, or transmitting exceptions.

invariants.predicate: The selected Conversation wake-ready affordance requires an aligned local Apple PushToTalk system session plus backend wake-capable receiver evidence.
invariants.repairAction: ConversationStateMachine gates backend wake-ready fallback through backendShowsWakeReadyAffordance, which requires aligned local Device PTT evidence.

invariants.predicate: A selected live call may preserve connected UI during control-plane reconnect grace, but normal Hold To Talk must remain disabled until fresh control-plane transmit evidence returns.
invariants.repairAction: canTransmitNow rejects control-plane reconnect grace and websocket state changes immediately resync the selected Conversation projection.

invariants.predicate: The selected Conversation must not remain in receiving after a remote transmit stop has settled outside the projection grace window.
invariants.repairAction: ConversationStateMachine ignores stale peer-transmitting signal evidence once remote stop is observed and playback drain/projection grace has cleared.

invariants.predicate: Accepting a connection requires an active incoming Beep for the selected Friend.
An active transmit epoch must carry channel evidence.
Local audio capture may start only after the engine has both a backend transmit lease and Apple system-transmit-began evidence for the same begin attempt.
An active transmit epoch must not reference a different channel than the joined Conversation.
A backend active-transmit clear event must match the local transmit epoch before it may clear local state.
An active transmit epoch must carry foreground or wake-capable receiver addressability evidence.
A connection request requires selected Friend evidence for the requested contact.
Disconnecting a Friend requires joined Conversation evidence for that Friend.
The first-audio deadline elapsed before the receive path observed audio progress.
Local audio capture must belong to the current active transmit epoch.
A backend local-transmit observation requires joined Conversation evidence before the engine may recover local transmit state.
No remote audio chunk may be scheduled after the matching transmit stop has been accepted.
Receiver addressability updates require a joined Conversation to identify the target channel and receiver.
A received audio chunk failed to reach scheduled playback.
Playback schedule must not contain duplicate chunk IDs for the active receive epoch.
PTT audio activation did not complete before its deadline.
PTT audio activation failed before receive playback could proceed.
Remote audio chunk transmit ID must match the current receive epoch.
Remote audio chunk handling requires an active or prepared receive epoch.
Remote transmit stop must match the active receive epoch.
A system transmit-begin callback must not conflict with an existing local transmit epoch.
A system transmit-begin callback requires joined Conversation evidence before the engine may recover local transmit state.
System transmit begin failed after the engine requested transmit activation.
A transmit begin acknowledgement requires the engine to be in beginning phase.
Beginning or recovering local transmit requires foreground or wake-capable receiver addressability evidence.
Beginning local transmit requires joined Conversation evidence.
Beginning local transmit requires typed receiver readiness evidence.
A transmit stop acknowledgement requires the engine to be in stopping phase.
Outbound audio was about to be sent before the remote receiver readiness gate was satisfied.
invariants.repairAction: remote receiver readiness gate suppresses outbound audio and waits through bounded wake-recovery grace windows.

invariants.predicate: The first outbound audio payload was queued to at least one transport but no receiver playback ACK arrived before timeout.
invariants.repairAction: The sender records missing receiver playback proof so diagnostics can distinguish queued media from heard media and escalate fallback policy.

invariants.predicate: A receiver first-audio playback ACK arrived for the current media path, but the sender had no pending first-audio expectation for that transmit epoch.
invariants.repairAction: First-audio ACK and Direct playback verification state is cleared when a new transmit startup epoch begins, while duplicate ACKs after a completed expectation remain ignored.

invariants.predicate: Client remains transmitting or receiving beyond the allowed grace window after backend active-transmit lease expiry.
A stale transmit-ended signal or completion clears a newer active transmit projection.
invariants.repairAction: transmit stop completion carries the owning transmit target and is ignored when a newer active target is current.

invariants.predicate: Transmit startup side effect completed after its owning attempt became stale.
invariants.repairAction: transmit startup side-effect completion is ignored when its owning attempt is no longer current.
